pm_decision_extract.decision_or_assessment: Surge-short entry decision for GV: 186% 5-day surge with structural absence of corroborating catalyst evidence
evidence_used: corporate_calendar.splits (1:15 reverse split May 2024 — distress signal)
alternative_data_features.wikipedia_pageviews (13 views on decision day; baseline 8-27; no spike)
evidence_missing: news_event_summary.items (0 items; 20 dropped post-cutoff — cannot assess specific catalyst narrative)
filing_confirmation.SEC_8K_confirmation (null — no 8-K to corroborate public event)
pm_decision_extract.reasoning_summary: GV surged 186% in 5 days (373% intraday gap on 3/6 open) on 19.5x volume. Upstream agents (Narrative, Alt-Data Verify, Surge-Short) converge on a strong bear thesis: structural absence of corroborating catalyst evidence relative to the magnitude of the move. Fundamental deterioration is severe: TTM net margin -175.69%, gross margin -25.6% (negative), current ratio 0.066 (liquidity crisis), debt/equity 9.46x, EPS negative for last 2 quarters. No SEC 8-K filings in 90 days despite the move — a listed company with a real catalyst would file. No news items in 7-day window (20 items dropped post-cutoff). No insider buying (Form 4 = 0 in 90 days). No institutional positioning data. Alternative data silent: Wikipedia pageviews flat (13 views on decision day vs 8-27 baseline); GitHub unmapped; FMP sentiment endpoints empty; no retail meme attention detected. Reverse split (May 2024) is a classic distress signal. Information integrity assessment: low-tier sources only, uncorroborated. Macro regime is Overheat / Moderately Restrictive with strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline — GV fails all quality gates. The surge appears to be momentum/retail attention on a distressed micro-cap, not value creation. Structural absence of hard-to-fake corroboration (news, filings, insider activity, institutional positioning) relative to the narrative magnitude is the core bear-thesis signal per §13.6 SOFT_REASONING and the asymmetric absence rule. Risk agent confirms no hard-veto conditions tripped. Surge-short entry at $3.70 (last_eod_close 3/5) is warranted at 0.5% initial position per §4.8.
invalidation_conditions: If a material SEC 8-K or press release emerges post-decision confirming a legitimate M&A, partnership, or product launch that explains the surge, the bear thesis weakens.
If institutional 13F filings show significant new positions in GV post-decision, momentum may have real backing.
If subsequent earnings or guidance materially improve margins and cash flow, the fundamental deterioration narrative may be outdated.
If insider Form 4 filings show CEO/CFO buying at current levels, confidence in the short thesis would decline.
If price sustains above $5 with positive news catalyst and volume remains elevated, cover decision would be triggered.
risk_flags: Micro-cap liquidity: 188M shares traded on 3/6 (19.5x avg); potential for short squeeze if borrow availability tightens.
Reverse split history (1:15 in May 2024) suggests prior distress; stock may be subject to delisting risk if price falls below $1.
Negative working capital (current ratio 0.066) indicates potential covenant breach or forced liquidation risk; bankruptcy risk is material.
High debt/equity (9.46x) with negative cash flow; refinancing risk is acute.
Macro regime: Overheat / Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2); equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution — GV fails all quality gates.
No news corroboration within cutoff window; narrative may be retail-driven meme momentum rather than fundamental catalyst.
Structural absence of hard-to-fake signals (news, filings, insider activity, institutional positioning) is the primary bear-thesis evidence.
suggested_improvements: Monitor Form 4 filings for insider activity in the 5 trading days post-decision; absence of insider buying would further support the short thesis.
Track borrow availability and short-squeeze risk via real-time borrow-cost and shares-available feeds (note: architectural gaps per §5.16).
Assess whether the surge is driven by retail social-media attention (Reddit, StockTwits) rather than institutional positioning; sentiment data currently unavailable.
Monitor for follow-up news/filings on 3/6 and 3/7 to assess whether the move is sustained or reverses.
If price reaches 2x entry ($7.40), evaluate add-on trigger per §4.8 pyramid rules.

narrative_event.reasoning_summary: GV exhibits a 153.4% 5-day return with 19.5x relative volume spike (188M shares vs 9.7M 20d avg) on 2025-03-05, triggering opening-window analysis at 2025-03-06 09:30 ET. However, the evidence packet reveals a CRITICAL STRUCTURAL ABSENCE: news_event_summary.status='data_unavailable' with 20 items dropped post-cutoff, filing_confirmation.status='not_evaluated' with no 8-K rows, and polygon_news returning 0 rows in the 7-day lookback window. This absence pattern is ASYMMETRIC and INFORMATIVE for a surge_short candidate. The company's sector and business model cannot be inferred from the packet (no fundamental_snapshot.sector field, no 10-K Item 1 business description in packet). Valuation metrics show distress: PE=-0.047, PB=0.144, EV/EBITDA=-5.69, net_margin=-314%, debt_to_equity=9.46, current_ratio=0.066. Most recent earnings (2024-11-21) reported EPS=-1.72 and revenue=$3.3M. The 1:15 stock split on 2024-05-29 preceded this move. Wikipedia pageviews show baseline 8-27 views/day with no spike pattern (peak 27 views on 2025-02-08, then decay to 8-13 views by decision date). No GitHub activity (unmapped_ticker). No Form 4 insider transactions in 90 days. No FMP sentiment data. The price surge is UNACCOMPANIED by any corroborating news, filing, or alternative-data signal that would be expected for a legitimate catalyst in this company's sector. The structural absence of news/filing/sentiment evidence RELATIVE TO the magnitude of the price move is the primary bear-thesis signal. This is consistent with a momentum/technical spike without fundamental catalyst, or a potential pump-and-dump pattern. The company is deeply unprofitable, highly leveraged, and illiquid (current_ratio=0.066 suggests solvency stress). Absence of corroboration is NOT a data gap — it is a SIGNAL that the move lacks a concrete, verifiable catalyst.
invalidation_conditions: If a material news event or SEC filing dated 2025-03-05 or earlier is discovered post-analysis, the 'no catalyst' verdict would be invalidated.
If insider buying or Form 4 activity on 2025-03-05 or earlier is confirmed, the momentum-only thesis weakens.
If alternative-data sources (GitHub, sentiment, ownership) show abnormal activity on 2025-03-05 or earlier, the absence pattern is broken.
If the company announces a concrete acquisition, partnership, or financing deal with specific terms and counterparty, the vague-narrative flag is downgraded.
If earnings surprise or guidance revision is confirmed for Q2 2024 (filed 2024-09-29), the negative EPS may be recontextualized.

narrative_event.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: The evidence packet's news_event_summary block is the critical failure point: 20 items were dropped post-cutoff, leaving 0 items for analysis. This is a SCHEMA DESIGN ISSUE — the packet should either (a) include pre-cutoff news items in the items[] array, or (b) explicitly flag that the cutoff window (09:30 ET on 2025-03-06) is too early to capture news published on 2025-03-05 market hours. The opening_window decision mode (first 10 minutes of trading) is incompatible with news-driven catalyst analysis when the news feed is filtered to pre-market only. Additionally, the information_integrity_assessment block is marked 'insufficient_evidence' with use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, but no alternative narrative-verification mechanism is wired. The agent is left with ONLY price/volume/valuation data and no news/filing/sentiment corroboration. This is a structural gap in the v1 schema for surge_short candidates, where absence of corroboration is precisely the signal.
recommended_followups: URGENT: Retrieve full news feed for 2025-03-05 (market hours 09:30-16:00 ET) and 2025-03-06 pre-market (04:00-09:30 ET) to identify the catalyst.
URGENT: Query SEC EDGAR for any 8-K, 4, or other material filings dated 2025-03-05 or 2025-03-06 pre-market.
Analyze intraday price/volume to pinpoint the exact time of the surge and cross-reference with news/filing timestamps.
Check for short-squeeze indicators (borrow availability, short interest, days-to-cover) to assess momentum vs. fundamental catalyst.
Retrieve company investor relations press releases for 2025-03-05 or earlier.
Verify company sector and business model to apply sector-specific alternative-data adapters (e.g., if biotech, check FDA filings; if SaaS, check GitHub/developer activity).
Analyze social media (Twitter/X, StockTwits, Reddit, Seeking Alpha) for coordinated pump activity or meme-stock attention on 2025-03-05.
If no catalyst is found, escalate to risk team for potential manipulation/pump-and-dump assessment.
Monitor for follow-up news/filings on 2025-03-06 and 2025-03-07 to assess whether the move is sustained or reverses.

alt_data_verify.decision_or_assessment: Narrative-Price Dislocation Verification for GV surge candidate
alt_data_verify.reasoning_summary: GV exhibits a 153% 5-day surge with 19.5x relative volume, triggering surge_short classification. Cross-check against alternative-data evidence reveals structural absence of corroboration across multiple hard-to-fake channels. Wikipedia pageviews (only available alt-data) show baseline attention (6-27 views/day, mean ~15) with no spike pattern coinciding with the price surge. Fundamental snapshot shows severe distress: -314% net margin, -1.59 EPS, negative PE, 9.46x debt-to-equity, and operating cash flow of -2.3M. Corporate calendar shows two recent negative earnings (Nov 2024: -1.72 EPS, Aug 2024: -0.88 EPS). No news articles available in 7-day window (20 items dropped post-cutoff). No 8-K filings in 90 days. No insider Form 4 activity in 90 days. Sentiment adapters failed or returned zero rows. SEC 13F unavailable. GitHub unmapped. The absence of news, filings, insider activity, and sentiment corroboration—despite a 153% surge—is consistent with a pump-and-dump or retail-driven meme move lacking fundamental or institutional catalyst. Macro regime is 'Overheat / Moderately Restrictive' with strict equity discipline, which further dampens confidence in quality-of-move thesis. The surge appears driven by retail volume and attention, not hard-to-fake institutional or operational signals.
invalidation_conditions: Positive earnings surprise or guidance raise post-decision
Major institutional buyer disclosure (13F or Form 4 insider purchase)
Strategic partnership or acquisition announcement
Debt restructuring or capital raise that materially improves balance sheet
Regulatory approval or clinical trial success (if biotech component exists)
Sustained volume and price above $5 with positive news catalyst

surge_short.reasoning_summary: GV surged 186% in 5 days (373% intraday gap on 3/6 open) on 19.5x volume. However, the structural evidence footprint contradicts a legitimate catalyst narrative. (1) FUNDAMENTAL DETERIORATION: TTM net margin -175.69%, gross margin -25.6% (negative), current ratio 0.066 (severe liquidity crisis), debt/equity 4.75x, EPS negative for last 2 quarters. (2) STRUCTURAL ABSENCE OF CORROBORATION: No SEC 8-K filings in 90 days despite the magnitude of the move — a listed company with a real catalyst would file. No news items in the 7-day window (20 items dropped post-cutoff, suggesting the narrative is post-decision). No insider buying (Form 4 = 0 transactions in 90 days). No institutional positioning data. (3) ALTERNATIVE DATA SILENCE: Wikipedia pageviews flat (13 views on decision day vs 8-27 baseline); no GitHub footprint (unmapped_ticker); FMP sentiment endpoints all empty; no retail meme attention detected. (4) VALUATION INCOHERENCE: PE ratio negative, PB 0.14, EV/EBITDA negative. The company is unprofitable, illiquid, and highly leveraged. (5) REVERSE SPLIT HISTORY: 1:15 reverse split in May 2024 is a classic distress signal. (6) INFORMATION INTEGRITY: Low-tier sources only; no primary source; uncorroborated narrative. The surge appears to be momentum / retail attention on a distressed micro-cap, not value creation. The absence of SEC filings, news, insider activity, and institutional positioning relative to the narrative magnitude is the core bear-thesis signal under §13.6 SOFT_REASONING and the universal-soft-veto principle.

If insider Form 4 filings show CEO/CFO buying at current levels, confidence in the short thesis would decline.
